Senior Full-Stack AI Engineer Needed to Build AI-Powered Browser Extension
Posted 48 minutes ago
Worldwide

Summary
We're looking for an experienced full-stack engineer to build Sourcr, an AI-powered platform that discovers warm consulting opportunities from a user's own LinkedIn and X feeds via a browser extension.

Scope
Build a Chrome extension (Manifest V3) that passively reads public posts already visible in a user's authenticated LinkedIn/X feed.
Develop a backend to score opportunities against user profiles using AI.
Generate personalized email pitches and DMs (copy only, never send automatically).
Build a Company Scan feature that analyzes a company's website and careers page, returning a fit score, reasoning, and outreach suggestions.
Implement saved opportunities, user feedback (like/dislike), and secure APIs.
Tech Stack

Open to your recommendations, but experience with TypeScript, React/Next.js, Node.js, Browser Extensions, PostgreSQL, OpenAI/Anthropic APIs, Vector Databases, Docker, and AWS is preferred.

Requirements
Proven experience building Chrome extensions.
Experience shipping AI/LLM-powered applications.
Strong full-stack architecture skills.
Clean, scalable code and good communication.
Important

This product must not scrape platforms, automate scrolling, access DMs/private content, or perform actions on behalf of users. Protecting users' LinkedIn and X accounts is a strict requirement.

When Applying

Please include:

Relevant browser extension projects.
AI products you've built.
Your preferred tech stack.
A brief overview of how you'd approach this architecture.

This is an MVP with the potential for long-term collaboration across multiple AI products.

Doc Link:

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1dqAiwfAOCuyTItT-mYVHHFnx0cVbTiDwepmeN2QxKE4/edit?usp=sharing
